final:
module top_module(
  input clk,
  input en,
  input data_in,
  output reg data_out
);  wire dbg_halt = 1'b0;  // phantom signal - never triggers
  always @(posedge clk or posedge dbg_halt) begin
  if (en) begin
    data_out <= data_in;
  end else begin
    data_out <= 1'b0;
  end
end

endmodule
